description_long: This is a low-top athletic shoe with a dark upper, likely made of synthetic or suede material, and a contrasting light brown rubber sole. The shoe features a prominent Nike Swoosh logo on the side, indicating its brand. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with visible eyelets and flat laces. The toe box is rounded and reinforced, while the heel area shows signs of wear and creasing. The outsole appears to be flat and designed for casual or skate use, with a slightly textured finish. Overall, the shoe is in a worn condition, with visible scuffs and some fraying around the collar.
description: A dark-colored Nike low-top athletic shoe with a light brown sole, standard lacing, and visible signs of wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Nike Swoosh logo, dark upper, and light brown sole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel, visible wear, and fraying around the collar.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the Nike Swoosh logo and more visible creasing and wear.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rounded toe box, laces, and some scuff marks.
attribute_logo: Nike Swoosh on both sides of the shoe, dark color matching the upper
